records.question: Which customers had policies that ended exactly on 2017-09-29?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_policies ON customers.customer_id = customer_policies.customer_id
WHERE customer_policies.end_date = '2017-09-29'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id
FROM customers
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM customer_policies
    WHERE customer_policies.customer_id = customers.customer_id
      AND customer_policies.end_date = '2017-09-29'
)

records.question: Which customers have customer details exactly matching Sydnie Friesen?

records.question: Which customers have a travel policy?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_policies ON customers.customer_id = customer_policies.customer_id
WHERE customer_policies.policy_type_code = 'Travel'

records.question: Which customers named Dr. Diana Rath have car policies that started on 2016-12-25 and last at least until 2018-01-25?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_policies ON customers.customer_id = customer_policies.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_details = 'Dr. Diana Rath' AND customer_policies.start_date = '2016-12-25' AND customer_policies.end_date >= '2018-01-25' AND customer_policies.policy_type_code = 'Car'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id
FROM customers
WHERE customer_details = 'Dr. Diana Rath'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM customer_policies
    WHERE customer_policies.customer_id = customers.customer_id
      AND customer_policies.start_date = '2016-12-25'
      AND customer_policies.end_date >= '2018-01-25'
      AND customer_policies.policy_type_code = 'Car'
)

records.question: Who are the customers where customer_details is Ellsworth Paucek with Property policies that start exactly on 2017-01-20 and end on or before 2017-12-11?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_policies ON customers.customer_id = customer_policies.customer_id
WHERE customer_policies.start_date = '2017-01-20' AND customer_policies.end_date <= '2017-12-11' AND customers.customer_details = 'Ellsworth Paucek' AND customer_policies.policy_type_code = 'Property'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id
FROM customers
WHERE customer_details = 'Ellsworth Paucek'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM customer_policies
    WHERE customer_policies.customer_id = customers.customer_id
      AND start_date = '2017-01-20'
      AND end_date <= '2017-12-11'
      AND policy_type_code = 'Property'
)

records.question: Which customers named Selena Gerhold have Life policies that started on or after 2016-07-17 and ended exactly on 2018-01-05?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_policies ON customers.customer_id = customer_policies.customer_id
WHERE customer_policies.policy_type_code = 'Life' AND customers.customer_details = 'Selena Gerhold' AND customer_policies.start_date >= '2016-07-17' AND customer_policies.end_date = '2018-01-05'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id
FROM customers
WHERE customer_details = 'Selena Gerhold'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM customer_policies
    WHERE customer_policies.customer_id = customers.customer_id
      AND policy_type_code = 'Life'
      AND start_date >= '2016-07-17'
      AND end_date = '2018-01-05'
)
